How to play Astronaut without misunderstanding the basics

Master the loop first; opinions about “hot rounds” can wait until you understand the buttons.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Round flow

Select a stake, enter during the betting window, watch the multiplier rise, and cash out before the crash ends the round. Miss the window — lose the stake. Everything else is style.

Most clients show recent multipliers and quick bet chips. Ignore the clutter until the core loop feels automatic.

Beginner pitfalls

  • Martingale after losses.
  • Chasing legendary multipliers every flight.
  • Playing on unstable commuter networks.
  • Ignoring promo wagering rules.

Ready for liftoff? Claim your bonus and launch Astronaut at 1win.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need lightning reflexes?

You need a plan more than reflexes. Pre-decide cashout bands when possible.
